description: Dynamic drill-down for every automatically observed DefenseClaw agent. Stable agent/root/parent/lifecycle/execution IDs correlate Prometheus inventory and totals, Loki event detail, and Tempo traces.

options.content:
# Agent360 · `$agent`
Stable identity → lifecycle/executions → models, tools, websites, security decisions → Tempo trace. **Scope** chooses only this agent or its full descendant tree. The hook recovery section distinguishes enforced blocks from observe-mode would-blocks and shows the following agent path. Unknown tokens/cost remain absent rather than being rendered as zero.

panels.title: Agent Directory — click an Agent ID to drill down
panels.description: Every hook lifecycle transition updates defenseclaw.agent.last_seen. This table therefore discovers new agents automatically; no dashboard JSON is generated per agent.

targets.expr: 1000 * topk by (connector, gen_ai_agent_id) (1, max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector"}[$__range]))
time() - max(max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Turns
panels.description: Completed turns counted from the durable lifecycle event stream, so collector restarts and sparse counter samples do not erase the total.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="turn_end" [$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Model calls
panels.description: Model responses counted from the durable LLM event stream. This includes intermediate responses that do not close the overall agent turn.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="model.response" [$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Tool calls
panels.description: Completed tool results counted from the durable tool event stream. Post-only hook connectors remain visible even when no matching pre-hook was observed.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="tool.invocation.completed" [$__range])) or vector(0)

count(count by (gen_ai_agent_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",defenseclaw_agent_root_id=~"$agent",defenseclaw_agent_parent_id!="",gen_ai_agent_id!="$agent"}[$__range]))) or vector(0)

panels.title: Input tokens
panels.description: Connector-reported prompt/context tokens from completed model calls. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the rolling one-hour window contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. Long-context agents can report much more input than output. Missing usage is absent, not guessed.

targets.expr: sum((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="input"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="input"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="input"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="input"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="input"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Output tokens
panels.description: Connector-reported completion tokens from completed model calls. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the rolling one-hour window contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. Missing usage is absent, not guessed.

targets.expr: sum((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="output"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="output"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="output"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="output"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",kind="output"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Reported cost
panels.description: Latest cumulative USD cost only when the connector explicitly reports it. Missing cost is shown as Not reported; DefenseClaw never infers prices.

targets.expr: sum(max by (gen_ai_agent_id, defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_reported_cost_USD{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Terminal event success rate
panels.description: Completed terminal lifecycle events divided by completed, failed, and interrupted terminal events in Loki. Active-only ranges correctly remain without a terminal outcome.

targets.expr: 100 * (sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"session_end|subagent_stop|turn_end" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_state="completed" [$__range])) or vector(0)) / sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"session_end|subagent_stop|turn_end" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_state=~"completed|failed|interrupted" [$__range]))

panels.title: Execution phase timeline
panels.description: Continuous per-execution state from the native phase gauge. Values persist between scrapes, while the ordered sequence below retains every sub-scrape transition.

targets.expr: max by (gen_ai_agent_name, defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (defenseclaw_agent_phase_current_ratio{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle",defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution"})

sum by (span_name) ((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s)))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, span_name) ((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))))

panels.title: Input/output tokens over time
panels.description: Rolling one-hour reported token increments. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the window contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. The fixed window keeps completed model calls visible after their short-lived lifecycle series stop exporting.

targets.expr: sum by (kind) ((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[1h]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[1h]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"} offset 1h) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[1h]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"} offset 1h)))

1000 * topk by (connector, gen_ai_agent_id, defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id, defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (1, max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent",defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle",defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution"}[$__range]))

panels.title: Model, tool, cost, lifecycle, and reliability analytics
Model calls by provider and model
panels.description: Durable LLM response events grouped by the provider/model actually reported by the connector. Missing model identity is shown as unreported rather than guessed.

targets.expr: sum by (provider, model) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="model.response" | label_format provider="{{if .body_gen_ai_provider_name}}{{.body_gen_ai_provider_name}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}", model="{{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else if .body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{else}}unreported{{end}}" [$__range]))

panels.title: Execution-lifetime model p95 (active in range)
panels.description: Cumulative p95 for executions with activity in the selected range. Execution-scoped histogram state keeps sparse and single-call agents visible without mixing in inactive executions.

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) ((last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",gen_ai_request_model!="",gen_ai_operation_name=~"chat|generate_content|text_completion"}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))))

panels.title: Top tools by calls
panels.description: Exact result-event counts in the selected time range; duplicate counter state from older executions is excluded.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (tool_name) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name="tool.invocation.completed" | label_format tool_name="{{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}}" | tool_name!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Execution-lifetime tool p95 (active in range)
panels.description: Cumulative p95 for tool executions with activity in the selected range. Execution-scoped histogram state keeps one-off tools visible.

targets.expr: topk(10, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le, gen_ai_tool_name) ((last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",gen_ai_tool_name!=""}[$__range])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s)))))

panels.title: Top websites and destinations
panels.description: Destination applications inferred from tool and network spans; raw host detail remains in Loki.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (destination) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"tool[.]invocation[.](completed|failed|blocked)|egress[.](allowed|blocked|completed|failed)" | label_format destination="{{if .body_defenseclaw_destination_app}}{{.body_defenseclaw_destination_app}}{{else}}{{.body_defenseclaw_network_target_ref}}{{end}}" | destination!="" [$__range])))

panels.title: Reported tokens by model
panels.description: Only connector-reported token usage. An established series contributes its counter increase; a series first published inside the rolling one-hour window contributes its latest cumulative completion value once. New observations carry provider/model labels; missing usage is not estimated.

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model, kind) ((((increase(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range]) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range]) * 0)) and defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"} offset $__range) or (last_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range]) unless defenseclaw_agent_token_usage_total{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"} offset $__range)))

panels.title: Reported cost over time
panels.description: Latest cumulative connector-reported USD total per lifecycle. Missing cost is shown as Not reported; DefenseClaw never infers prices.

targets.expr: sum(max by (gen_ai_agent_id, defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id, gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) (defenseclaw_agent_reported_cost_USD{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}))

panels.title: Reported cost by model
panels.description: Cumulative connector-reported cost grouped by the model/provider carried by the lifecycle observation. Missing cost is shown as Not reported; DefenseClaw never infers prices.

targets.expr: sum by (gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) (max by (gen_ai_agent_id, defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id, gen_ai_provider_name, gen_ai_request_model) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_reported_cost_USD{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])))

panels.title: Lifecycle event totals
panels.description: Exact lifecycle event totals from Loki. This remains accurate across collector restarts and includes sparse pre/post hook transitions.

targets.expr: sum by (defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_event) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"session_(start|end)|subagent_(start|stop)|turn_(start|end)|compact_(start|end)" | label_format defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_event="{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_event}}" [$__range]))

100 * (sum((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent",status_code="STATUS_CODE_ERROR"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))) or vector(0)) / clamp_min((sum((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_calls_total{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s))) or vector(0)), 0.000000001)

sum by (le) ((rate(defenseclaw_agent_span_duration_milliseconds_bucket{connector=~"(${connector:regex}|^$)",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__rate_interval])) and on (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max by (defenseclaw_agent_execution_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__range])) >= (time() - $__range_s)))

panels.title: Active agents over time
panels.description: Distinct selected-scope agents whose reported last-seen timestamp is within five minutes of each evaluation step.

targets.expr: count(max by (connector, gen_ai_agent_id) (max_over_time(defenseclaw_agent_last_seen_seconds{connector=~"$connector",$scope_label=~"$agent"}[$__interval])) > time() - 300)

panels.title: Models, tools, websites, and security decisions
LLM turns — prompts, responses, model, usage
panels.description: Full connector-supplied model input and output are rendered exactly as present after DefenseClaw's central OTEL projection. This panel applies no additional truncation or hiding; expand a row for every exported field.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"model[.](request|response|call[.]failed|stream[.]completed)" | json body_gen_ai_input_messages="body[\"gen_ai.input.messages\"]", body_gen_ai_output_messages="body[\"gen_ai.output.messages\"]" | line_format "{{.event_name}} · provider={{.body_gen_ai_provider_name}} request_model={{.body_gen_ai_request_model}} response_model={{.body_gen_ai_response_model}} · request_id={{.body_defenseclaw_model_request_id}} response_id={{.body_defenseclaw_model_response_id}} · input={{.body_gen_ai_input_messages}} · output={{.body_gen_ai_output_messages}} · tokens={{.body_gen_ai_usage_input_tokens}}/{{.body_gen_ai_usage_output_tokens}} · outcome={{.outcome}} · trace_id={{.correlation_trace_id}} span_id={{.correlation_span_id}}"

panels.title: Tools and website/network interactions
panels.description: Tool name, destination app, arguments/result, and network egress metadata remain trace-correlated.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"tool[.]invocation[.](requested|started|completed|failed|blocked)|egress[.](requested|allowed|blocked|completed|failed)" | line_format "{{.event_name}} · tool={{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}} type={{.body_gen_ai_tool_type}} provider={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_provider}} call_id={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_id}} status={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_status}} exit={{.body_defenseclaw_tool_exit_code}} destination={{.body_defenseclaw_destination_app}} target={{.body_defenseclaw_network_target_ref}} · arguments={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_arguments}} · result={{.body_gen_ai_tool_call_result}} · outcome={{.outcome}} · trace_id={{.correlation_trace_id}} span_id={{.correlation_span_id}}"

panels.title: Errors, blocks, approvals, and guardrail decisions
panels.description: Canonical approval requests/resolutions, errors, scanner verdicts, judges, findings, and final connector-facing hook decisions. Approval rows retain the approval ID and terminal result; a hook decision says whether the block was enforced or only would have blocked.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | connector=~"$connector" | event_name=~"approval[.](requested|resolved)|hook_decision|guardrail[.](evaluation[.](completed|failed)|judge[.]completed)|finding[.](observed|correlated)|enforcement[.].*|.*failed" | line_format "{{.event_name}} · severity={{if .severity}}{{.severity}}{{else}}{{.body_defenseclaw_security_severity}}{{end}} · approval={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_id}} result={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_result}} actor={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_actor_type}} command={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_command}} dangerous={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_dangerous}} · hook={{.body_defenseclaw_hook_event}} action={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_effective_action}} raw={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_raw_action}} enforced={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_enforced}} would_block={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_would_block}} · reason={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_reason}} · finding={{.body_defenseclaw_finding_description}} · outcome={{.outcome}} · trace_id={{.correlation_trace_id}} span_id={{.correlation_span_id}}"

panels.title: Enforced hook blocks
panels.description: Final hook decisions actually returned as block to the connector. This is distinct from a scanner verdict that was downgraded by observe mode or an unsupported hook surface.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | event_name="hook_decision" | connector=~"$connector" | body_defenseclaw_guardrail_enforced="true" [$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Observe-mode would-blocks
panels.description: Guardrail decisions that would have blocked but were returned as an allowed/advisory outcome because the connector is in observe mode or the hook surface cannot enforce.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | event_name="hook_decision" | connector=~"$connector" | body_defenseclaw_guardrail_would_block="true" [$__range])) or vector(0)

panels.title: Hook action outcomes over time
panels.description: Decision time-series for the selected agent execution. Hook decisions show enforcement and advisory outcomes; canonical approval resolutions are counted separately by their terminal result.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | event_name="hook_decision" | connector=~"$connector" | body_defenseclaw_guardrail_enforced="true" [$__interval])) or vector(0)

sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | event_name="hook_decision" | connector=~"$connector" | body_defenseclaw_guardrail_would_block="true" [$__interval])) or vector(0)

sum(count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | event_name="hook_decision" | connector=~"$connector" | body_defenseclaw_guardrail_effective_action=~"alert|confirm" [$__interval])) or vector(0)

sum by (approval_result) (count_over_time({service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | event_name="approval.resolved" | connector=~"$connector" | label_format approval_result="{{.body_defenseclaw_approval_result}}" | approval_result!="" [$__interval])) or on() vector(0)

panels.title: Decision → recovery path
panels.description: Ascending, execution-scoped chronology. Find a hook_decision, then read the next rows: a later tool call/result, model prompt/response, lifecycle completion, or another hook decision is the observed recovery path. A missing later row means DefenseClaw did not observe a subsequent hook event in this execution.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | event_name=~"approval[.](requested|resolved)|hook_decision|tool[.]invocation[.].*|model[.].*|session_(start|end)|subagent_(start|stop)|turn_(start|end)|guardrail[.].*|.*failed" | connector=~"$connector" | line_format "#{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_sequence}} · {{.event_name}} · phase={{.body_defenseclaw_agent_phase}} · approval={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_id}} result={{.body_defenseclaw_approval_result}} · hook={{.body_defenseclaw_hook_event}} action={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_effective_action}} raw={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_raw_action}} enforced={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_enforced}} would_block={{.body_defenseclaw_guardrail_would_block}} · tool={{.body_gen_ai_tool_name}} · model={{if .body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{.body_gen_ai_response_model}}{{else}}{{.body_gen_ai_request_model}}{{end}} · trace_id={{.correlation_trace_id}}"

panels.title: Operation and enforcement traces — click a Trace ID
panels.description: Shows agent creation and transition spans, model/tool/session operations, workflow runs, approvals, and enforcement attempts across the selected lifecycle. Clicking Trace ID carries the selected connector, agent, scope, lifecycle, and execution into the waterfall without forwarding an empty trace variable.

targets.query: { span.defenseclaw.connector.source =~ "${connector:regex}" && span.defenseclaw.agent.lifecycle.id =~ "$lifecycle" && span.defenseclaw.agent.execution.id =~ "$execution" && (("$scope_label" = "gen_ai_agent_id" && span.gen_ai.agent.id = "$agent") || ("$scope_label" = "defenseclaw_agent_root_id" && span.defenseclaw.agent.root.id = "$agent")) && (span.defenseclaw.span.family =~ "span.agent.invoke|span.agent.transition|span.workflow.run|span.model.chat|span.tool.execute|span.approval.resolve" || span.gen_ai.operation.name =~ "invoke_agent|execute_tool|chat|generate_content|text_completion" || span.defenseclaw.agent.lifecycle.event =~ "session_start|session_end|subagent_start|subagent_stop|turn_start|turn_end|tool_start|tool_end|compact_start|compact_end|event" || name = "exec.approval" || span.defenseclaw.guardrail.raw_action =~ "block|confirm|alert" || span.defenseclaw.guardrail.effective_action =~ "block|confirm|alert" || span.defenseclaw.guardrail.decision =~ "block|deny") } with (most_recent=true)

panels.title: Selected trace waterfall — selection required
panels.description: Expected initial state: this panel has no data until you click a Trace ID in the table on the left. After selection, the selected lifecycle, work, approval, or enforcement trace renders as an ordered parent/child waterfall.

panels.title: Ordered lifecycle and work sequence — root to terminal
panels.description: Ascending canonical chronology for the selected root tree or agent. Every retained v8 event is included; the rendered line exposes stable session, lineage, lifecycle, execution, request, turn, operation, model, tool, approval, and W3C trace correlation, while expanded rows retain every exported field.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} |= "$agent" | json | __error__="" | body_$scope_label=~"$agent" | body_defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | body_defenseclaw_agent_execution_id=~"$execution" | connector=~"$connector" | line_format "#{{.body_defenseclaw_agent_sequence}} · {{.event_name}} · panels.title: Lifecycle DAG — prompt → agents → work → outcomes
panels.description: Canonical Loki event DAG for the selected root or agent, not a total event timeline. Session-start and spawn anchors are recovered from the last 24 hours; a recovered spawn is retained only when that child has graph-eligible activity in the selected range. Each recovered agent endpoint suppresses itself whenever that exact agent ID has graph-eligible activity in the selected range, keeping boundary edges renderable without duplicating the visual node. For graph-active agents, canonical 24-hour session_start or subagent_start identity metadata wins regardless of later event volume; only agents without a canonical start use a one-row-per-ID selected-range fallback. Stable agent IDs therefore define one node per agent, while optional session details remain in the linked raw views so totals are not split across duplicate node IDs. A Session start anchor is deliberately not presented as prompt content. A grouped Prompt inputs node counts canonical depth-zero prompt submissions in the selected range, including the initial request and later follow-ups, without adding one node per message. Codex uses connector-source UserPromptSubmit facts and excludes native OTLP model.request mirrors from the summary; other connectors use recognized prompt-submission hooks with model.request as a fallback so hook-only and model-only connectors remain visible. Prompt counts are distinct by turn ID, model request ID, request ID, operation ID, then occurrence ID inside each observation family/source, after which the largest source count is shown. Native and connector records remain unchanged in the linked raw and ordered drilldowns. The dashboard applies no redaction: it displays or links every field present in canonical OTEL, with DefenseClaw's central redaction and projection boundary upstream. Model, tool, and approval groups use request records so work remains visible without a terminal counterpart; totals are request counts, not assertions that work is still pending. Terminal records remain available in the linked lifecycle, raw, decision, and trace views. Repeated model calls collapse per owning agent, provider, and model. Model-call totals first sum within each observation source and then use the largest source total, preventing connector and OTLP-receiver mirrors from double-counting the same calls while retaining source-only observations. Repeated tool calls collapse per owning agent into normalized families: Skills, MCP, Bash, File edits, Collaboration, Web / browser, Visual, and Task control; an unrecognized tool keeps its reported name. Exact collaboration send_message requests are excluded from the generic tool-family groups so they are not represented twice. Canonical send_message requests to /root or /root/* collapse per sender into one Messages to root node whose target resolves to the exported root agent ID; exact root task paths and calls remain in the raw and ordered drilldowns, while non-root targets remain explicitly grouped as reported. Turn outcomes group completed, failed, and interrupted turns per owning agent; session and subagent outcomes remain execution-specific. Click a grouped node or edge for Total in range, count meaning, ownership, lineage provenance, and drill-down links to exact calls, operations, exit codes, and traces. Approval edges are dashed and agent/execution-scoped because approval events do not export an exact tool-call ID. The graph is directed acyclic and uses Grafana's layered layout.
